title: [cross-file] net_recv_data called outside rx_mutex allows double-free on error
close_reason: Not a bug. pkt is a stack-local pointer. Ownership semantics are clear: net_recv_data takes ownership on success (we don't unref), or we retain and unref on failure. No cross-thread access to pkt after creation. rx_mutex protects rx_ipv6_buf, not pkt.
